name: notifications-mail
description: Mail channel. Thin wrapper around Laravel Mail (MailManager) that adds the notification-specific concerns Laravel doesn't ship: template/category/preference orchestration, React Email pre-rendered HTML resolution + Blade interpolation at send, CAN-SPAM footer + RFC 8058 List-Unsubscribe header injection, provider webhook ingestion (Mailgun / SendGrid / AWS SES / Postmark / Resend), NotificationDelivery state tracking via provider message id correlation, hard-bounce address suppression, per-provider observability + cost tracking. Owns ONE entity: `MailSuppression` (hard-bounced / complained / manually-blocked email addresses).

channelRegistration.registration: Service provider calls `NotificationChannelRegistry::register('mail', MailChannel::class)` in boot(). Delegates transport to Laravel Mail's MailManager — driver selected per config('notifications-mail.default') OR per-category via config('notifications-mail.categories.{category_slug}.mailer').

central.description: Public provider webhook receivers. Signature-verified per provider.
